sqlMap.select: select count(id) from i_information_special_t where validflag > 0 and departmentid = $departmentid$
select * from i_information_special_t where validflag > 0 and departmentid = $departmentid$
sqlMap.update: update i_information_special_t set specialName='$specialName$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' where id = $id$
update i_information_special_t set count = count+1 where id = $id$
update i_information_special_t set count = count-1 where id = $id$
